name: Pineapple Upside Down Cake
recipeIngredient: 20 ounces pineapple rings in juice, sliced in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Use a 13x9 pan.
3. Melt butter and brown sugar in the pan.
4. Arrange pineapple slices in any pattern in the pan and cover with walnuts. Set aside.
5. Beat egg yolks, add sugar, and juice. Add flour, baking powder, and salt.
6. Fold in beaten egg whites and pour over the pineapple mixture in the pan.
7. Bake for 40-45 minutes.
8. Cool for 5 minutes and invert onto a serving plate. Allow to cool completely.
